name: Nodebb
description:
A next-generation discussion platform.

Docs: https://docs.nodebb.org/?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  nodebb:
    image: ghcr.io/nodebb/nodebb:latest
    volumes:
      - nodebb_build:/usr/src/app/build
      - nodebb_uploads:/usr/src/app/public/uploads
      - nodebb_config:/opt/config
    command: |
      /bin/bash -c " cat > /usr/src/app/setup.json <<EOL {
          \"defaults\": {
              \"postgres\": {
                  \"host\": \"postgres\",
                  \"port\": 5432,
                  \"database\": \"nodebb\",
                  \"username\": \"ua299e7802c\",
                  \"password\": \"d06086e75919236047de3bd8d5b72958\"
              }
          }
      } EOL && tini -- entrypoint.sh "
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - bash -c ':> /dev/tcp/127.0.0.1/4567' || exit 1
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 3
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42083:4567
  postgres:
    image: postgres:17.2-alpine
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_USER=ua299e7802c
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=d06086e75919236047de3bd8d5b72958
      - POSTGRES_DB=nodebb
    volumes:
      - nodebb_postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - pg_isready -U $${POSTGRES_USER:-liva24a871f} -d $${POSTGRES_DB:-nodebb}
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  nodebb_build: null
  nodebb_uploads: null
  nodebb_config: null
  nodebb_postgres_data: null
